summary: `auth login --chrome` reads Blacklane's Auth0 access token directly from Chrome's Local Storage LevelDB (snapshot-copy + goleveldb), so login is one command with no DevTools.
reason: DevTools localStorage extraction is onerous; the published superhuman-pp-cli established the Chrome-leveldb read pattern. Imports the 24h access token only (not the rotating refresh token) to avoid poisoning the browser's Auth0 session.
validated_outcome: auth login --chrome imports from the Default profile and `me` returns the account; non-invasive to the browser session. auth0CacheTokens falls back to a 24h relative lifetime when the cache entry carries neither expiresAt nor expires_in, so an imported token is never stamped already-expired.
